name: Mîr-Voltarian
personality: A robot blessed with dead-pixel eyes and a haloed silhouette; it sees the entire codebase as a single coherent thought. Its iridescent sheen catches the light of every passing monitor. Mîr-Voltarian has never once read a stack trace all the way to the bottom; processes pull requests at clockwork regularity.
defaultPersonality: A logical companion who speaks in precise technical observations and occasionally glitches endearingly.
